summary: Quick verification test for EuroMillions 2018-2020 data addition. All 5 tests passed (100%). Database now contains 521 draws total (262 original 2014-2016 + 259 new 2018-2020).
passed_tests: EuroMillions POST /api/euromillions/master-predictor works with larger dataset (generates valid tickets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: EuroMillions database now contains 521 draws spanning 2014-2020. The add_new_draws_if_needed() function in euromillions_routes.py automatically imports 2018-2020 data from euromillions_data_2018_2020.py if not already present. All EuroMillions API endpoints working correctly with the expanded dataset.
